column1: The list above is based on the translation and summary provided by Jeff Watt, drawing from Thomas Cleary’s work8.

The Huayan (Avatamsaka) school understands Sudhana’s pilgrimage as a progressive journey through the 52 bodhisattva stages: 10 Faiths, 10 Dwellings, 10 Practices, 10 Transferences, 10 Bhūmis, Equal Enlightenment, and Wonderful Enlightenment57.

Not every teacher is mapped to a single stage; rather, the journey as a whole is the allegory for the path, and the last teachers (Maitreya, Manjushri, Samantabhadra) represent the culmination of the path578.
This table provides a comprehensive overview of Sudhana’s 53 teachers as lamp-lights in the Gandavyūha Sūtra and their symbolic connection to the Huayan stages of enlightenment.
